signals.summary: Northstar Revenue announced a $28M Series B round to expand go-to-market operations and enterprise sales coverage.
The company opened roles for RevOps Manager, Senior Marketing Operations Manager, and two Enterprise SDRs.
Northstar Revenue launched a new attribution analytics product line aimed at larger multi-region revenue teams.

companySnapshot: Northstar Revenue is a growth-stage RevOps software company serving mid-market and enterprise B2B revenue teams.
The business appears to be scaling up leadership reporting, SDR coverage, and cross-functional GTM execution after fresh funding.
strategicPriorities: Improve forecast confidence for executive leadership and board reporting.
Standardize lead routing and handoffs between marketing, SDR, and account executives.
Strengthen attribution visibility as channel mix expands.
painPoints: Pipeline reporting still depends on manual reconciliation across systems.
Attribution trust is weak when finance and marketing compare results.
New hires increase urgency for repeatable workflows and cleaner operational visibility.
recentNews: Raised a $28M Series B round in April 2026.
Expanded hiring across RevOps, marketing operations, and SDR leadership.
Released a new analytics product for complex revenue teams.
intelReport.recommendedOutreach: Lead with how unified revenue visibility can shorten board-prep time, improve routing discipline, and help a scaling RevOps team absorb new hires without adding reporting chaos.
